title: Axiom.
content:
Let him who toils, enjoy
        Fruit of his toiling.
     Let him whom sweats annoy,
        No more be spoiling.

     For we would have it be
        That, weak or stronger,
     Not he who works, but he
        Who works not, hunger!
meaning:
Francis William Lauderdale Adams's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Axiom."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
